mapper.select: SELECT p.id, CONCAT( CASE m.client_type WHEN 1 THEN 'admin' WHEN 2 THEN 'app' ELSE 'other' END, ':', m.module_key, ':', p.action_code ) AS permission_code, p.permission_desc, m.id, m.client_type FROM tb_permission p JOIN tb_module m ON p.module_id = m.id where p.is_delete=0

SELECT CONCAT( CASE m.client_type WHEN 1 THEN 'admin' WHEN 2 THEN 'app' ELSE 'other' END, ':', m.module_key, ':', p.action_code ) AS permission_code FROM tb_permission p JOIN tb_module m ON p.module_id = m.id where p.is_delete=0 and p.id in
#{id}
